description: Outer space is a fascinating topic thatтАЩs captured peopleтАЩs imaginations for thousands of years. Many of these modern ideas about space are influenced by ideas from the ancient world and the earliest discoveries about our universe. Space is so important in our daily lives that you might not even realize how often youтАЩre talking about it. Do you know that youтАЩre bringing up objects from the solar system whenever you mention a day of the week?
